character.name: abstract cosmic god-being, POWERFUL YET GRIEVING: a towering column of folded starlight and slow-turning rings, no face — only a bowed radiant geometry like a head lowered in mourning, trailing threads of unmade light, vast quiet sorrow, GBA-era 16-bit pixel art, dark outline, muted dusk palette with pale gold and void-violet, grim dark fantasy
